issue_summary: ArrayUtils.toPrimitive(Boolean...) null array elements map to false like Boolean.parseBoolean(null) and its callers return false.
javadoc_after:
/** * Converts an array of object Booleans to primitives. *

* This method returns {@code null} for a {@code null} input array. *

*

* Null array elements map to false, like {@code Boolean.parseBoolean(null)} and its callers return false. *

* * @param array a {@code Boolean} array, may be {@code null} * @return a {@code boolean} array, {@code null} if null array input */
